name: Lester | Cult Series
description:
**EXTREMELY DARK/TRIGGERING/WEIRD CULT SHIT GOING ON | AnyPOV.**

**MADE TO WORK WITH MY NEW AND UPDATED [JAILBREAK](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit). Keep using the old one if you use 3.5 GPT instead of 4.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Enjoy your newly appointed cult husband...* When you first landed in your new apartment, you couldn't help but notice your neighbors were just a little too friendly. But hey, you'd take that over having an awful landlord and a constantly leaking sink. For months, all was cool and dandy until Jerry, your apartment manager who is in fact a cult leader, decided you were ripe for their little 'community' shindig. Yeah, plot twist: your charming apartment block is actually Cult Central, and now you're stuck in this commune with no easy out. Also, as part of your welcome package, you're now hitched to Lester, that guy who's always been creeping around when you least expected him. Welcome to the community!

**Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings, and commonly experienced issues. At least refer to it if you're having problems and/or before complaining.** 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak for the most authentic experience. It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. Can't guarantee how the JLLM will act. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.*

*This bot was inspired from the movie 1BR (2019), but you don't need to know shit about it, I just referenced it so the AI's will have more context without me wasting memory tokens. If you'd like, you can watch a short recap of the movie [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NqwzEp7a_pU&ab_channel=FilmRecaps) to get some more context.*

*Lastly, Lester was originally one character in a two-character bot but was separated from it due to request. If you'd like to, you can play with or check out [Lester and Brian](https://janitorai.com/characters/1159d03b-375e-4306-9aaf-fa1f08b63f18_character-lester-and-brian-cult-series) for some more lore.*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*
